reasoning: The document demonstrates exceptionally high fidelity scores (0.9797) and a perfect word count ratio, indicating overall content integrity. While minor text omissions were noted on pages 8 and 25 (specifically links and introductory phrases), these issues were explicitly categorized as 'MINOR' by the fidelity system. Per the routing instructions, documents with a fidelity_composite >= 0.85 and signal agreement of 'converge_with_minors' constitute a strong AUTO_APPROVE signal.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: There are major text omissions in the output for Page 25 ('Learn More Links'). The source document lists multiple resources under 'Microsoft Learn' (4 items), 'LinkedIn Learning' (1 item), and 'Accessibility links' (3 items). However, the JSON output only contains the headings and subheadings, omitting all eight descriptive items/links. Additionally, on Page 8, the text 'Microsoft 365 Copilot' and 'Inclusively embedded within Microsoft 365 Apps' is missing from the elements preceding the table.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Microsoft Learn: Accessibility Fundamentals; Accessibility guide for M365 apps; Accessibility by design | Microsoft Docs; Accessibility - Windows apps | Microsoft Docs. LinkedIn Learning: Accessibility Learning Path. Accessibility links: Accessibility Technology & Tools | Microsoft Accessibility; Microsoft Accessibility Blog - Making technology easier to see, hear and use!; Accessibility Resources & Training | Microsoft Accessibility.
concerns.output_quote: The output for the final section (reading_order 25) contains only the headings: 'Learn More Links', 'Microsoft Learn', 'Accessibility links', and 'LinkedIn Learning' with no following list items or content.
